top_signals.title: The Iran war in seven charts
top_signals.summary: From oil markets to reconstruction, the fallout from the conflict will unfold over years
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Peak oil demand arrives sooner than expected
top_signals.summary: Amid the disruptions caused by the US-Israeli-Iran war, countries have begun adapting to life with less oil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Set to Rally on Iran Deal to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: US stock index futures jumped after Washington and Tehran reached an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices slumped.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Starbucks Korea to close stores for staff training after ‘Tank Day’ scandal
top_signals.summary: Coffee chain’s owner says move ‘shows how seriously we are taking the marketing incident’
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: One quality will be most in-demand from job-seekers in the AI era, Animoca co-founder Siu says
top_signals.summary: Yat Siu, the co-founder of Animoca Brands, says AI is going to change what skills are most valuable in the workforce.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU structural financial indicators: end of 2025
Baroness Hogg has been reappointed as a non-executive member of the Office for Budget Responsibility.
top_signals.summary: Baroness Hogg has been reappointed as a non-executive member of the Office for Budget Responsibility.

top_signals.title: German Satellite Maker OHB Seeks €500 Million to Fuel Growth
top_signals.summary: German satellite maker OHB SE is kicking off a stock offering to help it contribute to Europe’s space and defense programs as well as increase its free float.

top_signals.summary: Business supplies distributor is latest in string of UK targets for US activist hedge fund

top_signals.title: Chinese hackers hijack auth flow, spy on isolated network for a decade
